headline: Gilead Sciences Leans on HIV Growth as Deals Build Oncology, Inflammation Pipeline
summary: Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) Chief Commercial Officer and Head of Corporate Affairs Johanna Mercier said the company is leaning on its HIV business while continuing to build out oncology and inflammation through recent acquisitions and pipeline development.
